questions: If pharmacological treatment is indicated, are topical antifungal agents chosen? (Yes/No)
If oral antifungal agents are chosen, is Fluconazole chosen? (Yes/No)
If oral antifungal agents are chosen and Fluconazole is not chosen, is Terbinafine chosen? (Yes/No)
If oral antifungal agents are chosen and Fluconazole and Terbinafine are not chosen, is Itraconazole chosen? (Yes/No)
